github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Use flutter_test for unit tests and integration_test for E2E. Test pure functions (orp, sentenceResolver, parallaxOffset) directly. For widget tests, use WidgetTester.pumpWidget with ProviderScope. Always test reduced-motion code paths. Use 'group' for organization. Name test files *_test.dart.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Check for: (1) raw Color() with hex outside tokens.dart, (2) hardcoded TextStyle in widgets, (3) missing isReducedMotion check before animations, (4) camera code without graceful fallback, (5) mixing stage* and shell* tokens on wrong surface, (6) TextPainter allocation inside paint(), (7) heavy computation on main isolate, (8) Navigator.push instead of go_router, (9) setState for shared state instead of Riverpod, (10) missing shouldRepaint guards on CustomPainter.
